request: 在 Timeline Panel 的最上方，增加一個 X 的 close button ，方便可以隱藏 Timeline Panel ，效果就跟在主功能表上點擊 Hide Timeline 的效果一樣

constraints: Add 'X' close button at the top of Timeline Panel
Functionality: Hide Timeline Panel on click
Consistency: Match the behavior of 'Hide Timeline' from the toolbar
UI: Close button must be at the very top, before 'TIMELINE' text, without overlap.

baseline.current_behavior: Timeline Panel is toggled only via the toolbar. It currently lacks an internal close button.
